name: web-ux-gremlin
description: Create validated UX resilience plans and release gremlin-mode Playwright mayhem.

interface.shortDescription: Create validated UX resilience plans and release gremlin-mode Playwright mayhem.
interface.longDescription: Web UX Gremlin creates and validates UX resilience plans, then supports CLI or MCP execution workflows for gremlin-mode frontend testing with unusual but safe UX mayhem.
defaultPrompt: Plan, generate, run, and heal gremlin-mode Playwright tests for this web app.
Release the gremlins on a target flow: generate unusual UX mayhem specs, run them, and heal failures.

runtime.name: node
runtime.reason: Required to run npm, npx, and Playwright-based UX gremlin workflows.
